Zhuji Hongyue Communication Equipment Co., Ltd. presents a profile of an asset-light tech trading shell or consulting node with a history of long-distance corporate migration. Established in 2001, its USCC retains the '9131' Shanghai prefix, and its former names reveal a trajectory from 'Shanghai Hongyue' to 'Mianyang Hongyue' (Sichuan) before settling in Zhuji (Zhejiang). Despite an impressive paid-in capital of 5 Million RMB and an ambitious business scope claiming 'Integrated Circuit Manufacturing' and 'Communication Equipment Manufacturing', its physical and operational reality strongly contradicts this. With only 1 insured employee and a registered address in 'Room 313, 3rd Floor' of an industrial building, it entirely lacks the workforce and facility scale for semiconductor fabrication or hardware manufacturing.
